subcodes.title: Words to Ethel Rosenberg et al, spoken in June 1904
subcodes.first_line: Abdu'l-Baha said that through the mercy of God, not through His justice, the condition of those who have died in sin and unbelief can be changed.
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
